question: Design a `SecretAgent` class where the agent's `codename` is public, `trueIdentity` is private, and `missionBriefing` is protected. Show how these access levels restrict or permit access from outside and from a derived class `Handler`.

test_cases.expected:
--- Demonstrating Access from Outside (main function) ---

Accessing Public Member (codename) of SecretAgent:
Agent1's Codename: Ghost
Agent1's Codename (modified): Phantom
Agent Codename: Phantom

Accessing Private Member (trueIdentity) of SecretAgent:
Direct access to agent1.trueIdentity: [Compilation Error]
True Identity (via public method): Ethan Hunt

Accessing Protected Member (missionBriefing) of SecretAgent:
Direct access to agent1.missionBriefing: [Compilation Error]

--- Demonstrating Access from Derived Class (Handler) ---

Accessing Public Member (codename) of Handler:
Handler1's Codename: Specter
Agent Codename: Specter

Accessing Protected Member (missionBriefing) from Handler:
Handler 'Specter' reviewing mission briefing: Provide tactical support for Ghost.

Accessing Private Member (trueIdentity) from Handler:
Handler 'Specter' attempting to access private trueIdentity: [Not permitted directly]
True Identity (via public method): Ilsa Faust

--- Summary Reports ---
Secret Agent Status Report:
  Codename: Phantom
  True Identity (via public method): Ethan Hunt
  Mission Briefing: [Only accessible by derived classes or friends]

Handler Info: 
  Codename: Specter
Handler 'Specter' reviewing mission briefing: Provide tactical support for Ghost.

driver:
int main() { SecretAgent agent1("Ghost", "Ethan Hunt", "Retrieve the stolen data."); Handler handler1("Specter", "Ilsa Faust", "Provide tactical support for Ghost."); std::cout << "--- Demonstrating Access from Outside (main function) ---" << std::endl; std::cout << "
Accessing Public Member (codename) of SecretAgent:" << std::endl; std::cout << "Agent1's Codename: " << agent1.codename << std::endl; agent1.codename = "Phantom"; std::cout << "Agent1's Codename (modified): " << agent1.codename << std::endl; agent1.displayCodename(); std::cout << "
Accessing Private Member (trueIdentity) of SecretAgent:" << std::endl; std::cout << "Direct access to agent1.trueIdentity: [Compilation Error]" << std::endl; std::cout << agent1.getTrueIdentity() << std::endl; std::cout << "
Accessing Protected Member (missionBriefing) of SecretAgent:" << std::endl; std::cout << "Direct access to agent1.missionBriefing: [Compilation Error]" << std::endl; std::cout << "
--- Demonstrating Access from Derived Class (Handler) ---" << std::endl; std::cout << "
Accessing Public Member (codename) of Handler:" << std::endl; std::cout << "Handler1's Codename: " << handler1.codename << std::endl; handler1.displayCodename(); std::cout << "
Accessing Protected Member (missionBriefing) from Handler:" << std::endl; handler1.reviewMissionBriefing(); std::cout << "
Accessing Private Member (trueIdentity) from Handler:" << std::endl; handler1.attemptPrivateAccess(); std::cout << handler1.getTrueIdentity() << std::endl; std::cout << "
--- Summary Reports ---" << std::endl; agent1.reportStatus(); std::cout << std::endl; handler1.reportHandlerInfo(); return 0; }
